description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Special Traffic and Transport Arrangements in Wo Hop Shek for Ching Ming Festival 2026
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 2026 清明節和合石的特別交通及運輸安排

2026-03-20T07:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Members of the public are advised that, the traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity is expected to be busier on the weekends during the period of Ching Ming Festival. Special traffic and transport arrangements are implemented in Wo Hop Shek for Ching Ming Festival, please visit TD’s webpage for details. Motorists are advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application. In case of traffic congestion, motorists should exercise tolerance and patience, and follow the instructions of the Police.
2026-03-20T07:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 公眾人士請留意，和合石墳場內及附近一帶路道的交通預計在清明節期間的週末會較為繁忙。當局已在清明節期間於和合石實施特別交通及運輸安排，有關詳情請參閲運輸署網頁。駕駛人士亦請留意電台、電視台或「香港出行易」流動應用程式發放的最新交通消息。如遇交通受阻，駕駛人士請保持忍讓，並遵從警方的指示。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High-Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車車次

2026-03-20T10:58:00.CONTENT_EN:
To meet passenger demand during the holidays, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips between Futian Station and Hong Kong West Kowloon Station:

2, 4, 5, 7 Apr: 13 additional pairs of train trips per day
- From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868
- From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867

3 Apr: 9 additional pairs of train trips
- From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868
- From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867

Purchase your tickets up to 15 days ahead of travel:
- 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app
- Appointed travel agents 
- Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
• Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay)
• Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time

Train schedules:
- 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app.
2026-03-20T10:58:00.CONTENT_CN:
配合假期客運需求，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下來往福田站及香港西九龍站的臨時車次：

4月2、4、5及7日：每日增加13對臨時車次
-由香港西九龍站前往福田站：G5834、G5836、G5838、G5840、G5842、G5844、G5846、G5848、G5850、G5852、G5854、G5856、G5868
-由福田站前往香港西九龍站：G5833、G5835、G5837、G5839、G5841、G5843、G5845、G5847、G5849、G5851、G5853、G5855、G5867

4月3日：增加9對臨時車次
-由香港西九龍站前往福田站：G5842、G5844、G5846、G5848、G5850、G5852、G5854、G5856、G5868
-由福田站前往香港西九龍站：G5841、G5843、G5845、G5847、G5849、G5851、G5853、G5855、G5867

如需購買15天內的車票：
-12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式
-指定代理
-前往香港西九龍站
•使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶）
•使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間

列車服務詳情：
-12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式。
